title: U.S.-China Agri Trade Battle Rekindled
summary:
Main
U.S.-China Agri Trade Battle Rekindled: South America's Gain, U.S. Farmers' Pain
This week's Allied Quantumsea Research examines the latest escalation in U.S.-China trade tensions following President Trump's announcement of a 100% tariff on Chinese imports, effective November 1. U.S.-China Trade Tensions Reignite: 100% Tariffs Threaten Agricultural Flows
On October 10-11, 2025, President Donald Trump announced a new 100% tariff on Chinese imports effective November 1, citing Beijing's restrictions on critical mineral exports.
